name: app-dev-team
description: An autonomous mobile app development team for Claude Code. 17 role agents (CEO/CPO/CTO, tech-lead/tech-manager, iOS/Android/backend devs, monetization, code review, QA, UX, ASO, DevOps, data, security, release) run in parallel to take an idea from scope to a shipped iOS/Android app. Wires the installed Axiom iOS, Material 3, and ASO skills, and ships a House Knowledge Base mined from real shipped apps.
